875d5e.title: Target Map: Pitch-Avatar Next.js App
875d5e.content:
## Architecture
- Next.js 14 app (App Router)
- Supabase backend (PostgreSQL + Auth)
- OpenAI integration (TTS, completions, embeddings)
- Resend for email

## Hardcoded Credentials
- Supabase URL: `https://kapkqziyceefxluxlvqc.supabase.co` (in supabase.ts, sara/create-project/route.ts)
- Supabase Anon Key: `sb_publishable_juNeZXupS_SXWtvvK1MdLw_gVRnqhsE` (multiple files)

## Authentication
- `lib/auth-guard.ts`: `requireAuth()` checks `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header via Supabase
- Middleware (`middleware.ts`): Does NOT enforce auth. Only redirects admin hostname and sets `x-pitch-host` header. Excludes `/api` from matching.

## API Route Auth Status
| Route | Auth | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| /api/ai/generate-audio | ❌ NONE | OpenAI TTS - free for anyone |
| /api/ai/generate-text | ❌ NONE | OpenAI completions - free for anyone |
| /api/ai/parse-cv | ❌ NONE | File upload + OpenAI parsing |
| /api/sara/chat | ❌ NONE | Full AI chat with RAG |
| /api/sara/create-project | ❌ NONE | Creates projects as ANY userId! |
| /api/sara/ingest | ⚠️ OPTIONAL | If SARA_INGEST_API_KEY not set, completely open |
| /api/coach/analytics | ❌ NONE | SERVICE ROLE - writes to training_sessions |
| /api/coach/evaluate | ❌ NONE | SERVICE ROLE - reads projects/slides/scenarios |
| /api/coach/save-to-rag | ❌ NONE | SERVICE ROLE - writes to buyer_scenarios, modifies projects |
| /api/coach/generate-question | ❌ NONE | OpenAI question generation |
| /api/coach/generate-questions | ❌ NONE | OpenAI questions (bulk) |
| /api/coach/sessions | ✅ requireAuth | No ownership check on projectId |
| /api/coach/instructions | ✅ requireAuth | No ownership check on projectId |
| /api/convert | ❌ NONE | File conversion proxy |
| /api/training-sessions | ❌ NONE | Mass assignment insert |
| /api/enrollments/send-invitation | ❌ NONE | Triggers email for any enrollmentId |
| /api/cron/process-enrollments | ⚠️ OPTIONAL | Only if CRON_SECRET env set |
| /api/cron/reminders | ⚠️ OPTIONAL | Only if CRON_SECRET env set |
| /api/cron/warmup-converter | ❌ NONE | No auth |
| /api/ingest | ✅ requireAuth | Bearer token required |
| /api/chat | ✅ requireAuth | Bearer token required |
| /api/v1/widget/events | ❌ NONE | Mock/dev only |

## Admin Panel
- Path: `/admin-x8f2p9/` (security by obscurity)
- No server-side auth enforcement found
- Contains real user data queries (enrollments, listeners)
- `/app/users/page.tsx` contains hardcoded mock user data with passwords

## Key DB Tables (from code)
- projects, slides, folders
- enrollments, listeners, groups
- training_sessions, buyer_scenarios
- knowledge_documents, sara_knowledge_chunks
- coach_settings
- mail_domains
